definition:
θειότης, -ητος, ἡ 
 (θεῖος) [in LXX: Wis.18:9 * ;] 
divine nature, divinity: Rom.1:20 (for ex. from π., see MM, Exp., xv).†
 SYN.: θεότης, deity, godhead, divine personality. θει. = divine nature and properties, a summary term for the attributes of deity, differing from θεότης as quality or attribute from essence  (AS)
